Description: Standardized metadata record for the Dengue case report form used in clinical and surveillance settings.
Research questions: What are the clinical features, warning signs, and outcomes of Dengue cases?
Inclusion Criteria: Individuals with suspected, probable, or laboratory-confirmed dengue infection presenting to participating healthcare facilities.
Exclusion Criteria: Individuals in whom dengue infection has been ruled out or who do not meet the clinical or laboratory case definition for dengue
Authors: Fake Author C; Fake Author D
Keywords: dengue; acute febrile illness; surveillance; arbovirus

Description: Standardized metadata record for the Mpox case report form used in routine surveillance.
Research questions: What are the demographic, epidemiological, and clinical characteristics of Mpox cases?
Syndrome / clinical presentation: Rash illness with fever and lymphadenopathy
Authors: Fake Author A; Fake Author B

Description: Standardized metadata record for the acute respiratory infection report form used in routine surveillance.
Research questions: What are the demographic, clinical, and outcome characteristics of ARI cases?
Target population: Suspected and confirmed acute respiratory infection cases
Inclusion Criteria: Individuals presenting with symptoms consistent with acute respiratory infection, including fever, cough, sore throat, shortness of breath, or other respiratory symptoms.
Exclusion Criteria: Individuals without evidence of acute respiratory infection or whose symptoms are attributable to a non-infectious cause.
Authors: Fake Author E; Fake Author F
Institutions: Example University; Example Primary Care Network
